title: Cobblemon Affinity Enchantments
description: Introduces Pokémon-type Affinity enchantments that provide percentage-based bonuses for specific types, similar to food buffs. These enchantments can be applied to any armor and are ideal for collectors and specialized hunters.
body:
Cobblemon: Affinities adds a new set of armor enchantments focused on Pokémon types. Each Affinity enchantment corresponds to a specific Pokémon type and provides a percentage-based bonus that increases the chance of encountering Pokémon of that type, similar in concept to food-based buffs.

Affinities can be applied to any piece of armor and are obtained through the enchanting table at the highest tier. The percentages are intentionally kept flexible and may be adjusted over time as balance and gameplay impact are evaluated. This mod is currently in an early testing phase.

In addition to practical use for targeted Pokémon hunting, Affinities are designed to support collection-focused gameplay, including themed armor sets and armor stand displays. As the mod evolves, feedback will be used to guide balance changes and potential future expansions.
